plugins.name: smoke-test-plugin
plugins.description: Scaffold an executable smoke-test framework into any project. /smoke-init bootstraps the framework + first runner; /smoke-add adds runners; /smoke-sync refreshes the shared lib.

plugins.name: session-continuity
plugins.description: Cross-session project memory via .session-continuity/SESSION_PRIMER.md + LEARNINGS.md, with fire-before-action hooks.

plugins.name: memory-audit-plugin
plugins.description: Audit a Claude Code project memory dir for rot (dangling pointers, orphans, unresolved links, DONE archive candidates, oversize index) and propose approval-gated fixes. One slash command: /memory-audit.
